folder-tagger.description: Custom Tree Explorer with Tag Support
views.explorer.tagger-view.name: Workspace Explorer (Tag Tree)
views.explorer.summary-view.name: Tag Summary
inputBox.prompt.modifyTags: Edit tags for this resource (separate with commas, semicolons or spaces)
msg.noValidObject: No valid file or folder selected.
config.tagColor.description: The color of the tag highlight and badge (e.g., charts.blue, charts.red).
config.enableFileNameHighlight.descripti: Whether to color the entire file/folder name. If false, only the badge will be colored.
config.hideUntagged.description: Whether to hide items that do not have any tags.
